This fun Boys Personalized Blue Camo Lunch Tote is great for safely toting lunch or snacks to school.
This fun Boys Personalized Blue Camo Lunch Tote is great for safely toting lunch or snacks to school. Blue camo patterned polyester material with an easy-to-clean inside lining. Full zipper closure. It is insulated to keep your lunch cool and has an adjustable buckled handle that you can attach to our matching backpack (sold separately). You can easily fit a water bottle and snack storage containers inside. There's also an exterior pocket to hold utensils, notes, etc. You can add a monogram, name or single initial for a small extra charge - or order this bag blank if desired. Measures 10 inches long by 3.5 inches wide by 8.5 inches high. Coordinating duffel bag, backpack, pencil bag and more are also available separately. For boys/men, we usually recommend a name or single initial instead of a monogram.

All links will be posted in the next post.
This is weeks old now. As I said in my 99p anime topic, haven't been posting them at the time of discovering them due to the issue s the majority on here seem to have with anything non-Disney that's animated.
This sale, just like anime over here, went un-noticed. HMV are connected to ADV and made some HUGE reductions to the most popular animes in existence. Nothing for 99p, most at £5.99, but the differences in price are huge.
For anyone interested, I ordered Elfen Lied Vol 1-4 and Akira: Ultimate Edition.
Next best = £13.99 for 4 out of the 7, £13.47 for Vol. 7.
Find-DVD hasn't got Vol. 4 or Vol. 6 listed and DVD PriceCheck is too **** to check with. But, going on the other prices, there's a 99.9% chance they have the same £5 and £7 price gap all the other volumes do.
Next best = £7.82 for Vol. 1, £9.89 for the other 3.
Next best: £7.97 + £1.45 delivery for Vol. 1&2, £7.99 for Vol. 3 and £8.97 + £1.45 delivery for Vol. 4.
Next best = £9.97 + £1.45 delivery for Vol. 1, 6 and 7 and £9.99 for the others.
Buying all 7 volumes works out cheaper than buying the (presumably) ****** M-lock box set.
£11.97 + £1.45 for Vol. 2.
Vol. 1 isn't listed on Find-DVD. There's a pretty high chance HMV will have the best price by some distance going on the price of Vol. 2, but you might want to check for yourself.
Too long. I had to do and bits, it would've took hours to do all the checking and stuff in one go!
Just going other some of the stuff to make sure the prices are still the same - Nearly all of them seem to be.
Deserves heat and rep for the work put into the post. Well done Op.
Just a note, if you're buying series, then dvdpacific.com is usually much cheaper.
Thanks for your time and effort Tune up. I recommend Last Exile myself... Goes with out saying which others I reconmend. I would buy them If I hadn't already got them. Cheers. *Heat and rep added*.
Elfen Lied is excellent, definitly worth picking up.
Great post op :thumbsup: Any particular recomendations?
Me and my girlfirend love to watch The Studio Ghibli anime films!
Can anyone recommend any more films like these? Im not too clued up on the anime scene but i love Akira and ghost in the shell as well.
- All 4 volumes costs £13.47 outside of HMV.
- The R2 M-lock box set costs £37.
- It's only 4 volumes (13 episodes) long.
Evangelion is probably the most loved out of all the series in the sale. It's like the Star Wars of the anime world; always a new release around the corner.
Just a note, if you're buying series, then dvdpacific.com is usually much ... Just a note, if you're buying series, then dvdpacific.com is usually much cheaper.
DVD Pacific are selling the box set for £17.46. ADV slimpak box sets exclude most extras, so it isn't really worth ordering the R1 box set when you can get all R2 volumes for £5.99 each + 10% QuidCo + £5/5% off HMV vouchers. Support the UK anime industry when the prices are so close.
You're right about them being cheaper by far usually - It would cost £28.25 x2 for both R2 .hack//SIGN box sets, or £13.47 per volume. You can get the entire series (Anime Legends, M-lock case) for £18 on DVD Pacific.
Elfen Lied is excellent, definitly worth picking up.Heat added.
In terms of value, Elfen Lied is the best:- All 4 volumes costs £13.47 ... The Construction Quality Control Manager (CQCM) is responsible for managing and performing the daily QC responsibilities of specific projects to ensure the project is constructed in accordance with the established minimum standards. The CQCM role includes direct oversight and review of the entire documentation and physical inspection phase of the work flow process and working with other in-house personnel (e.g.: Project Managers, Project Coordinators etc.) and external personnel to produce and document a quality product. The CQCM reports directly to the Project Manager and the VP of Construction.
The Construction Superintendent is responsible for managing and performing the daily Superintendent responsibilities of specific projects to ensure the project is constructed in accordance with the established minimum standards. The Superintendent role includes direct oversight and review of the entire documentation and physical inspection phase of the work flow process and working with other in-house personnel (e.g.: Project Managers, Project Coordinators etc.) and external personnel to produce a quality product. This position also includes the daily supervision of the field construction and to complete the work on schedule and within the budget. The Superintendent reports directly to the Project Manager and the VP of Construction.
The Project Engineer completes engineering projects by organizing and controlling project elements. Leebcor Services, LLC is looking for a Project Engineer candidate. This position requires the development of project objectives by reviewing and creating work plans, submittals for Superintendent and QC manager on Federal DOD projects. Project responsibilities include identifying project phases and elements; assigning personnel to phases and elements; assisting in minor design work using CAD; preparing budget proposals; and reviewing bids from contractors as assistance to field team.

On 01/02/2019, REIL announced Job notification to hire candidates who completed ITI, Diploma,  for the position of Technician, Technical Assistant, Engineer.
1. Qualification: The incumbent should be an ITI (NCVT) in Electronics Mechanical/ Radio & TV/ Electrical/PASSA/'O' Level Computer course equivalent to Foundation Level course with minimum 60% marks with one year Apprenticeship under the Apprenticeship Act, 1961, as applicable. The candidate should have minimum 02 years or more post qualification experience in Industry. Candidates having Computer Course equivalent to Advanced Diploma in Computer Applications shall be given added advantage; the incumbent should be computer savvy.
1. Qualification: The incumbent should be 3 years Diploma in Electrical/ Electronics & Communication Engineering from a recognised Institution/University with minimum 60% marks. The candidate should have minimum 02 years or more post qualification experience in Industry. Candidates having Computer Course equivalent to Advanced Diploma in Computer Applications shall be given added advantage; the incumbent should be computer savvy.
1. Qualification: The incumbent should be a graduate engineer in Electronics and Communication/ Electrical/ Computer Science branch, with minimum 60% marks from a recognized University/Institution; the incumbent should be computer savvy.
The candidates are required to submit their applications as per the prescribed format only, available on Website, with copies of proof of date of birth, qualifications, experience, caste and a recent passport size photograph etc., in hard copy. The scanned copy of the application alongwith required documents may be sent to the e-mail id given in the advertisement. However, the hard copy of the application along with all supporting documents should reach to the following address within 21 days of this advertisement. The application(s) received after the due date will not be considered. The application(s) so received shall be acknowledged and application number shall be allotted, and accordingly application no. of the shortlisted candidates and finally selected candidates shall be hosted on Company's website. Candidates working with Government, PSU or Autonomous bodies etc. should forward their application through proper channel. Relaxation to SC,ST,OBC,PH,EWSs, Ex-Serviceman and Sports person would be given as per Government guidelines.

The Susato Oriole tin whistle set includes 1 whistle head and 4 whistle bodies in the key of D, C, Eb and Bb. The head is easily adjustable and can be put easily on either of the bodies.
The Susato Kildare tin whistle set includes 1 whistle head and 3 whistle bodies in the key of D, C and Eb. The head is easily adjustable and can be put easily on either of the bodies.
This set includes one mouthpiece, which can be mounted to the following four included instruments. It also includes a stand and playing instructions.
Keep your tin whistle clean and free of dust with the leather bag for tin whistles.
Keep your instrument clean on the inside with this tin whistle / recorder brush. Quickly and effectively use this brush after a playing session by gently cleaning the inside with the rod.
